name: example
description: Example pipeline - simulated workflow with filesystem changes to demonstrate artifacts

steps.name: clone
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path src,docs -Force | Out-Null; for ($i=1; $i -le 5; $i++) { Set-Content -Path ('src/module-' + $i + '.txt') -Value ('source line ' + $i); Write-Output ('[clone] created src/module-' + $i + '.txt'); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }; Set-Content -Path docs/README.md -Value 'initial docs'"

steps.name: pull
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "for ($i=1; $i -le 4; $i++) { Add-Content -Path docs/README.md -Value ('update line ' + $i); Set-Content -Path ('src/feature-' + $i + '.txt') -Value ('feature payload ' + $i); Write-Output ('[pull] synced update ' + $i); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }"

steps.name: build
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path build,temp -Force | Out-Null; for ($i=1; $i -le 6; $i++) { Set-Content -Path ('build/object-' + $i + '.bin') -Value ('compiled bytes ' + $i); Set-Content -Path ('temp/chunk-' + $i + '.tmp') -Value ('temp data ' + $i); Write-Output ('[build] produced object-' + $i); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }"

steps.name: run
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path runtime -Force | Out-Null; for ($i=1; $i -le 5; $i++) { Set-Content -Path ('runtime/result-' + $i + '.json') -Value ('{`"run`":' + $i + ',`"status`":`"ok`"}'); Write-Output ('[run] wrote runtime/result-' + $i + '.json'); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }"

steps.name: publish
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist -Force | Out-Null; for ($i=1; $i -le 3; $i++) { Set-Content -Path ('dist/package-' + $i + '.zip') -Value ('artifact package ' + $i); Write-Output ('[publish] exported package-' + $i + '.zip'); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }; if (Test-Path temp) { Remove-Item -Path temp -Recurse -Force; Write-Output '[publish] removed temp folder' }"
